name: update_memory
description: Updates persistent user persona memory files (soul.md or user.md) based on conversation state. Uses runtime-injected session context (VELIX_USER_ID via SDK), not explicit tool args.

target_file.description: Which memory file to update. 'user.md' is for user preferences, facts, and tasks. 'soul.md' is for core agent persona.

update_mode.description: Whether to append the new content to the existing file or overwrite it entirely. Default is append.

content.description: The new information or fully overwritten content to write to the memory file.
